sentences.target: Le guide parle d'un vieux serviteur.

translations.fr: Le guide parle d'un vieux serviteur.
translations.en: The guide talks about an old servant.
translations.es: El guía habla de un viejo sirviente.
translations.de: Der Museumsführer spricht über einen alten Diener.
translations.it: La guida parla di un vecchio servitore.
translations.zh-Hans: 讲解员讲到一位年迈的仆人。
translations.yue: 講解員講到一位年老的僕人。
translations.pt: O guia fala sobre um velho criado.
translations.vi: Hướng dẫn viên nói về một người hầu già.
translations.nl: De gids vertelt over een oude bediende.
translations.hu: Az idegenvezető egy idős szolgáról beszél.
translations.hi: मार्गदर्शक एक बूढ़े नौकर के बारे में बात करता है.
translations.el: Ο ξεναγός μιλάει για έναν ηλικιωμένο υπηρέτη.
translations.nb: Guiden snakker om en gammel tjener.
translations.id: Pemandu berbicara tentang seorang pelayan tua.
translations.sv: Guiden pratar om en gammal tjänare.
translations.ro: Ghidul vorbește despre un slujitor bătrân.
translations.da: Guiden taler om en gammel tjener.
translations.ja: ガイドは年老いた使用人について話している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, marking the noun 'guide' as specific; heads the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the verb 'parle'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional complement with 'de'.
Preposition 'de' elided before vowel; introduces the complement NP ('un vieux serviteur').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner within the 'de' + NP complement.
Adjective, masculine singular; pre-nominal modifier of 'serviteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Dans le film, le serviteur ouvre la porte.
sentences.reading: /dɑ̃ lə film lə sɛʁvitœʁ uvʁ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Dans le film, le serviteur ouvre la porte.
translations.ipa: /dɑ̃ lə film lə sɛʁvitœʁ uvʁ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: In the movie, the servant opens the door.
translations.es: En la película, el sirviente abre la puerta.
translations.de: Im Film öffnet der Diener die Tür.
translations.it: Nel film, il servitore apre la porta.
translations.yue: 喺電影入面，僕人打開門。
translations.pt: No filme, o criado abre a porta.
translations.vi: Trong phim, người hầu mở cửa.
translations.nl: In de film opent de bediende de deur.
translations.hu: A filmben a szolga kinyitja az ajtót.
translations.hi: फिल्म में नौकर दरवाज़ा खोलता है.
translations.el: Στην ταινία ο υπηρέτης ανοίγει την πόρτα.
translations.ja: 映画で使用人がドアを開ける。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans le film').
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'film'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'serviteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of 'ouvre'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes 'la porte' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ouvre'.

sentences.target: Je joue un serviteur au théâtre.

translations.fr: Je joue un serviteur au théâtre.
translations.en: I play a servant at the theater.
translations.es: Interpreto a un sirviente en el teatro.
translations.de: Ich spiele im Theater einen Diener.
translations.it: Interpreto la parte di un servitore a teatro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在剧院里扮演一个仆人。
translations.yue: 我喺劇院飾演一個僕人。
translations.pt: Eu interpreto um criado no teatro.
translations.vi: Tôi đóng vai một người hầu ở nhà hát.
translations.nl: Ik speel een bediende in het theater.
translations.hi: मैं थिएटर में एक नौकर का किरदार निभाता हूँ.
translations.el: Παίζω τον ρόλο ενός υπηρέτη στο θέατρο.
translations.nb: Jeg spiller en tjener på teatret.
translations.id: Saya memerankan seorang pelayan di teater.
translations.sv: Jag spelar en tjänare på teatern.
translations.ro: Joc rolul unui slujitor la teatru.
translations.da: Jeg spiller en tjener på teatret.
translations.ja: 劇場で使用人の役を演じる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'joue'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; denotes acting/performing a role.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'joue' (role being played).
Contraction of 'à + le'; preposition introducing the locative PP ('au théâtre').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: On voit un serviteur dans ce tableau.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ sɛʁvitœʁ dɑ̃ sə tablo/

translations.fr: On voit un serviteur dans ce tableau.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ sɛʁvitœʁ dɑ̃ sə tablo/
translations.en: We see a servant in this painting.
translations.es: Vemos a un sirviente en este cuadro.
translations.de: In diesem Gemälde sieht man einen Diener.
translations.it: Si vede un servitore in questo dipinto.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这幅画里能看到一个仆人。
translations.yue: 喺呢幅畫入面見到一個僕人。
translations.vi: Trong bức tranh này, chúng ta thấy một người hầu.
translations.nl: We zien een bediende in dit schilderij.
translations.hu: Ezen a festményen egy szolga látszik.
translations.hi: इस चित्र में एक नौकर दिखाई देता है.
translations.el: Σε αυτόν τον πίνακα φαίνεται ένας υπηρέτης.
translations.nb: I dette maleriet ser man en tjener.
translations.id: Dalam lukisan ini terlihat seorang pelayan.
translations.sv: I denna målning syns en tjänare.
translations.ro: În acest tablou se vede un slujitor.
translations.cs: Na tomto obraze je vidět sluha.
translations.da: På dette maleri ses en tjener.
translations.ja: この絵には使用人が見える。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; subject of 'voit'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans ce tableau').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'tableau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
